cost_name: PEM H₂ Compression — 30 bar Outlet → Industrial Offtake (30-50 bar) — 100 MW — Europe 2025

estimation.estimation_method: IRENA 2024 compression cost breakdown. PEM 30 bar outlet already at industrial offtake pressure — minimal additional compression for pressure regulation and metering only. One small booster stage if offtake requires >30 bar.

confidence.rationale: Based on IRENA cost data for industrial offtake compression. PEM's pressurized output minimizes compression cost — this is a technology-specific advantage documented in TC-PEM-001.

primary_drivers: Offtake pressure above 30 bar (additional stage per 30 bar increment)
Flow rate (larger compressor = lower per-unit cost)

sources.title: IRENA Green Hydrogen Cost Reduction 2024 — Compression cost breakdown
sources.author: IRENA
